purpose: Cheap corrected exact-transducer falsification before any full-DES product implementation.
claim_limit: A positive result authorizes only a separately frozen full-DES H_PI screen. It is not full-DES evidence, H_obs, learned value or an MFSC numerical claim.
commitment: All three product targets for a week are frozen at the weekly action. Batch completions occur at hours 24, 72 and 120; demand occurs at hours 30, 54, 78, 102, 126 and 150, avoiding same-time ambiguity.
backlog_rule: Product FIFO; later matching production serves backlog before inventory accumulation. Pending targets cannot be redirected.
resource_rule: Every calendar commits exactly 24 batches, 120000 ration units and the same gross line and transport capacity. Product labels do not change gross resources.

screen.pass_rule: At least two adjacent positive cells have mean exact oracle-minus-best-static H_PI >= 0.015; null calendar scores and ledgers are bit-identical; oracle has non-superior mean unfulfilled quantity and no worse worst-product fill.
screen.stop_rule: Otherwise stop before validation or full DES.

validation.required_future_rule: Simultaneous one-sided 95% LCB >=0.01 over a connected region, with static calendar reselected in every bootstrap resample.
